verses.1: He who dwells in the secret place of the Most High
verses.2: I will say of the LORD, “He is my refuge and my fortress;
verses.3: For he will deliver you from the snare of the fowler,
verses.4: He will cover you with his feathers.
verses.5: You shall not be afraid of the terror by night,
verses.6: nor of the pestilence that walks in darkness,
verses.7: A thousand may fall at your side,
verses.8: You will only look with your eyes,
verses.9: Because you have made the LORD your refuge,
verses.10: no evil shall happen to you,
verses.11: For he will put his angels in charge of you,
verses.12: They will bear you up in their hands,
verses.13: You will tread on the lion and cobra.
verses.14: “Because he has set his love on me, therefore I will deliver him.
verses.15: He will call on me, and I will answer him.
verses.16: I will satisfy him with long life,
